portal_subtitle: Search, filter, and jump between learning paths from one place.
intro_text: Use the search bar to look for a topic, then narrow the view by category. Start with the recommended learning path if you are onboarding new users.
start_here_title: Recommended learning path for new users
start_here_text: Start with the essentials, then move into reporting, tracking, and workflow tools once the basics are in place.
